ValidationRule.description: Superseded by Submission_Status__c (e.g. Project Manager Submits for Client Approval).
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( Ready_for_Client_Review__c = TRUE, (TEXT(Status__c) != "Backlog" && TEXT(Status__c) != "In Review"), OR( ISCHANGED(Ready_for_Client_Review__c), ISCHANGED(Status__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Ready for Client Review can only be checked when Status is Backlog or In Review. Please change Status to Backlog or In Review before submitting for client review.
